body: DONE — scripts/e2e-audit-trail.sh (UC-19). Creates session+run+task, claims/starts/completes task, completes run, then verifies: /v1/admin/audit-log, /v1/admin/audit-log/run/:id, /v1/runs/:id/audit, run event types in recent log, /v1/traces, /v1/trace/:id, /v1/graph/execution-trace/:run_id, /v1/sessions/:id/llm-traces. All return valid JSON or SKIP. Bash syntax OK.
